title: Environment Inventory Content
description: Schema for ENV_INVENTORY_CONTENT parameter that allows to create, replace, and delete Environment Inventory and related objects

paramSets.title: Parameter Sets
paramSets.description: Block that controls Parameter Set file operations

action.title: Action
action.description: Operation mode for the target Parameter Set file

place.title: Place
place.description: Defines where the Parameter Set file is stored

content.title: Parameter Set Content
content.description: Parameter Set definition as file content

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the Parameter Set file (without extension). Required for delete action. The file will be saved as <name>.yml

credentials.title: Shared Credentials
credentials.description: Block that controls Shared Credentials operations

action.title: Action
action.description: Operation mode for the Shared Credentials file

place.title: Place
place.description: Defines where the Shared Credentials file is stored

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the Shared Credentials File (without extension). The file will be saved as <name>.yml

resourceProfiles.title: Resource Profile Overrides
resourceProfiles.description: List of Resource Profile Override operations

action.title: Action
action.description: Operation mode for the Resource Profile Override file

place.title: Place
place.description: Defines where the Resource Profile Override file is stored

content.title: Resource Profile Override Content
content.description: Resource Profile Override as file content

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the Resource Profile Override file (without extension). Required for delete action.

sharedTemplateVariables.title: Shared Template Variable Files
sharedTemplateVariables.description: Block that controls Shared Template Variable File operations

action.title: Action
action.description: Operation mode for the Shared Template Variable File

place.title: Place
place.description: Defines where the Shared Template Variable File is stored

name.title: File Name
name.description: Name of the Shared Template Variable File (without extension). The file will be saved as <name>.yml

content.title: Shared Template Variable File Content
content.description: Shared Template Variable File content as key-value hashmap. Must NOT be located in a parameters directory

specificTemplateVersions.title: Specific Template Version Files
specificTemplateVersions.description: Block that controls Specific Template Version file operations

action.title: Action
action.description: Operation mode for the Specific Template Version file

place.title: Place
place.description: Defines where the Specific Template Version file is stored

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the Specific Template Version file (without extension). Required for delete action.

content.title: Specific Template Version Content
content.description: Content of the Specific Template Version file

templateVariables.title: Template Variable Files
templateVariables.description: Block that controls Template Variable file operations

action.title: Action
action.description: Operation mode for the Template Variable file

place.title: Place
place.description: Defines where the Template Variable file is stored

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the Template Variable file (without extension). Required for delete action.

content.title: Template Variable Content
content.description: Content of the Template Variable file as key-value hashmap
